targets.queryText:
SELECT
  CAST(strftime('%s', date(f.timestamp)) AS INTEGER) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS count
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND CAST(strftime('%s', f.timestamp) AS INTEGER)
      BETWEEN $__from/1000 AND $__to/1000
GROUP BY date(f.timestamp)
ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  CAST(strftime('%s', date(f.timestamp)) AS INTEGER) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS count
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND CAST(strftime('%s', f.timestamp) AS INTEGER)
      BETWEEN $__from/1000 AND $__to/1000
GROUP BY date(f.timestamp)
ORDER BY time

targets.queryText:
SELECT SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS "Total Cost"
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(r.parent_id, 'No Environment') AS environment,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
LEFT JOIN resources r ON r.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND r.resource_id = d.resource_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY r.parent_id
ORDER BY value DESC
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(r.parent_id, 'No Environment') AS environment,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
LEFT JOIN resources r ON r.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND r.resource_id = d.resource_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY r.parent_id
ORDER BY value DESC

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(i.display_name, d.identity_id) AS identity,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
LEFT JOIN resources r ON r.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND r.resource_id = d.resource_id
LEFT JOIN identities i ON i.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND i.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND i.identity_id = d.identity_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND ('${environment}' = '$__all' OR r.parent_id IN (${environment:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.identity_id
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(i.display_name, d.identity_id) AS identity,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
LEFT JOIN resources r ON r.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND r.resource_id = d.resource_id
LEFT JOIN identities i ON i.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND i.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND i.identity_id = d.identity_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND ('${environment}' = '$__all' OR r.parent_id IN (${environment:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.identity_id
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  CAST(strftime('%s', f.timestamp) AS INTEGER) AS time,
  d.product_category,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND CAST(strftime('%s', f.timestamp) AS INTEGER)
      BETWEEN $__from/1000 AND $__to/1000
GROUP BY time, d.product_category
ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  CAST(strftime('%s', f.timestamp) AS INTEGER) AS time,
  d.product_category,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND CAST(strftime('%s', f.timestamp) AS INTEGER)
      BETWEEN $__from/1000 AND $__to/1000
GROUP BY time, d.product_category
ORDER BY time

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id FROM chargeback_dimensions WHERE ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT r.parent_id AS environment
FROM resources r
WHERE r.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND r.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND r.parent_id IS NOT NULL

  AND r.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND r.parent_id IS NOT NULL
